usageRule: For future vertical clips, start with one of these opening/setup frameworks unless the user requests another style.

frameworks.visualPattern: Large title, neon grid, multiple mini cards, right-side use-case list, bottom quote
Huge title, three-step panels, retention chart, hook examples

frameworks.bestFor: Before/after stories, market reversal, transformation narratives
frameworks.visualPattern: Before and after blocks, bridge column, metric deltas

frameworks.bestFor: Overview of several models or choices
frameworks.visualPattern: Top headline, five center cards, horizontal selector rows
Large AIDA title, funnel stack, four detail panels

frameworks.bestFor: Narrative explainers where audience is the hero
frameworks.visualPattern: Seven-step left rail, blue panels, hero-problem-guide structure

frameworks.bestFor: News hooks, risk alerts, market updates, problem-solution clips
frameworks.visualPattern: PAS headline, tension curve, problem/agitate/solution cards

frameworks.bestFor: Daily finance/news updates like Bitcoin, gold, stocks
frameworks.visualPattern: Market label, big number hook, three signal cards, source footer, no progress bar
